matches.x: For the time is at hand; the day or the hour no man knoweth; but it surely shall come.

We have no doubt, but what wickedness will continue to increase in the land; and the times ‘ grow more and more perilous; for Paul has given us to understand, “that in the last days perilous times shall come,” and then he gives his reasons why they will be so. 2nd Tim. Ill, 5 first verses.
